Klasse PluginChangeEvent.PluginChangeAnnouncementEvent

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.events.PluginChangeEvent
org.quurz.plugins.events.PluginChangeEvent.PluginChangeAnnouncementEvent
Umschließende Klasse:
PluginChangeEvent
public static final class PluginChangeEvent.PluginChangeAnnouncementEvent extends PluginChangeEvent

Event indicating that a plugin change is about to be announced.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Verschachtelte Klassen - Übersicht

    Von Klasse geerbte verschachtelte Klassen/Schnittstellen PluginChangeEvent

    PluginChangeEvent.PluginChangeAnnouncementEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginInstallEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginUninstallEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginUpdateEvent

    Von Klasse geerbte Felder PluginChangeEvent

    pluginId

  • Methodendetails

    • isVetoed

      public boolean isVetoed()

      Checks whether the announced change has been vetoed.

      Gibt zurück:
      true if the change is vetoed, false otherwise

    • setVetoed

      public void setVetoed()

      Vetoes the announced change, preventing it from proceeding.
